Naomi Washington
Director of Development & Programs, New York, NY
naomi.washington@example.com | 555-201-3017 | linkedin.com/in/naomi-washington

SUMMARY
Nonprofit leader with 9 years in program management and fundraising for
community-based organizations. Builds donor relationships, writes winning grants,
and runs programs that deliver measurable community impact.

EXPERIENCE
Director of Development & Programs — Bright Futures NYC (2020–present)
- Lead fundraising and development, growing annual contributed revenue from $1.8M
  to $3.1M through major-donor cultivation, grant writing, and events.
- Manage youth-education and workforce programs serving 2,000+ participants;
  oversee program managers, volunteers, and community outreach.
- Write and steward foundation and government grants; report impact metrics to the
  board and funders.

Program Manager — Community Roots Alliance (2015–2020)
- Managed social-services programs and case management; coordinated volunteers and
  community partners and led grant reporting.

SKILLS
Nonprofit, program management, fundraising, development, grant writing, grants,
donor relations, community outreach, volunteers, social services, advocacy,
case management, stakeholders, impact measurement, programming

EDUCATION
M.P.A. Nonprofit Management, NYU Wagner, 2015
B.A. Sociology, Spelman College, 2012
